description:
AI Strategy Call: https://cal.com/bradley-bonanno/ai-strategy-call
Connect with Me: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradbonanno/
Context Audit Skill Download: https://brad-b.kit.com/e27e431783
Skills Marketplace Waitlist: https://brad-b.kit.com/f9a7349a1c
Original AI Second Brain Video:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wdc2tI_TGtM

I was constantly hitting my Claude Code usage limits, and now I can use it all day. The fix was cutting the invisible context bloat that every session was paying for. 

In this Claude Code tutorial I walk through the full setup I changed to stop burning tokens, and give away a free Context Audit skill that scans your Claude Code setup, scores it, and tells you exactly what to cut and why. Install it once and run it whenever your usage starts creeping up.

If you're looking for a great editor check out: nickjohnsuk.com

Timestamps
0:00 — Intro
1:19 — Audit your starting context
2:03 — MCP servers
2:29 — Replacing MCPs with CLIs
3:12 — Optimising your Claude.md
5:17 — Cutting skill bloat
6:02 — Settings.json tweaks that matter
7:27 — Installing the Context Audit skill
8:40 — Daily habits that save tokens
10:24 — Outro
